Video.summary: Ask the Experts with Dr. Harlan Selesnick, Cavities with Dr. Jose Blanco
Video.title: Smart Life S1E24

Video.summary: The focus of today's lecture is this: atonement. While we decided to act a certain way in the past based on our personality, we can now use this information to improve our current and future relationships.
Video.title: Relationships: Relationships Are Opportunities for Growth

Image.alt: Relationships: Relationships Are Opportunities for Growth
Relationships: Relationships Are Opportunities for Growth
Relationships: Relationships Are Opportunities for Growth

Video.summary: Every year, for eight months, thousands of families move to a desert in India to extract salt from the burning earth. Every monsoon the salt elds are washed away, the desert turns into sea.
Video.title: MY NAME IS SALT

Video.summary: Glenn and Amber have flipped over 1,000 houses and now they're looking for one lucky contestant to flip a house with. They are passionate about helping everyday people create wealth through real estate investing. So when casting call went out and submissions poured in. Watch as they look for the right partner to not only train but also to completely fund their first deal.
Video.title: A Winner Is Chosen

Video.summary: David and Alicia have won the contest, but the real game is about to begin. They have to find a house to flip, win Glenn and Amber's trust, and prove they can handle the pressures of house flipping. Because what David and Alicia don't know is that there's an even bigger test going on...Glenn and Amber are looking for more than a single flip, they want long-term investing partners they can fund. If these two newbies can get pull it off...they are about to get their Big Flipping Break!
Video.title: No House, No Flip

Video.summary: The team is feeling the pressure as a competitive real estate market threatens to kill the deal before they even get started. Glenn and Amber are starting to worry David and Alicia are in way over their heads.
Video.title: What's That Smell?

Video.summary: David and Alicia don't know they are being judged at every step by Glenn and Amber and the pressure is mounting. While looking for a General Contractor, questions about come up about how their managing the process. David and Alicia start taking demolition matters into their own hands.
Video.title: Surviving a Rollercoaster

Video.summary: The team confronts a problem that could make the entire profit of the job disappear. Watch as David and Alicia try to navigate a surprise visit from an environmental compliance agency.
Video.title: The Unwanted Houseguest

Video.summary: Glenn and Amber are in for a surprise of a lifetime and a contractor relationship goes sideways for Alicia and the team must recover fast.
Video.title: This House Is A Disaster

Video.summary: Day 7 of Teaching the Teachers addresses money, creativity, and service without guilt. Charging fairly is not unspiritual, and true integrity means showing up fully regardless of audience. Mastery comes through patience and practice, while real success flows from serving others for the right reasons.
Video.grandparentTitle: Teaching the Teachers with Marianne Williamson
Video.title: Teaching the Teachers - Day 7

Video.summary: Day 8 of Teaching the Teachers explores finding your authentic voice through service, humility, and receptivity. True power comes from emptying the ego, speaking on behalf of others, and showing up with spiritual impeccability. Teaching requires presence, strength, and keeping the focus on those you serve.
Video.grandparentTitle: Teaching the Teachers with Marianne Williamson
Video.title: Teaching the Teachers - Day 8

Video.summary: Day 9 of Teaching the Teachers emphasizes that every relationship is purposeful and offers an opportunity for growth. From brief encounters to lifelong assignments, relationships train us in love, grace, and righteous living. Even when physical proximity ends, the learning of the relationship remains.
Video.grandparentTitle: Teaching the Teachers with Marianne Williamson
Video.title: Teaching the Teachers - Day 9

Video.summary: Day 10 of teaching the Teachers challenges spiritual bypassing in social and political life. True spirituality does not avoid suffering but responds with love rather than fear. Adults are called to rethink inherited dogma, discern truth from distortion, and engage the world from higher consciousness.
Video.grandparentTitle: Teaching the Teachers with Marianne Williamson
Video.title: Teaching the Teachers - Day 10

Video.summary: Day 6 explores interdependence—the deeper truth that nothing exists alone. Through reflection and lovingkindness for all beings, we recognize the countless conditions that support our lives. This practice helps dissolve isolation and reconnect us with the larger web of life we belong to.
Video.title: Day 6 - Interdependence

Video.summary: Day 7 brings the course into action by exploring intention, execution, and letting go. Through reflection on core values, we learn to act with greater integrity, mindfulness, and compassion. This final practice celebrates growth and invites us to carry compassionate resilience into daily life.
Video.title: Day 7 - Taking Action

Video.summary: Bullying Prevention Expert Betty Hoeffner is who you need to know and when it comes to Bullying, Betty knows her stuff, she has been in the industry for over 20 years and the organization Hey U.G.L.Y (Unique Gifted Loveable You) is the organization you should support, because bullying within yourself or you becoming a victim is how this orgainzation can help you or a loved one.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Rico No Suave Talk Show
Video.title: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Betty Hoeffner

Image.alt: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Betty Hoeffner
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Betty Hoeffner
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Betty Hoeffner

Video.summary: The Rico No Suave Show With Special Guest Beverly Pomerantz, Casting Director Extraordinaire! Have you ever had a favorite TV Game Show that you wanted to be on? Have you ever thought about how contestants can get on a Game Show, well look no further because we have the Queen of Casting Directing on the show show with us! This was a fabulous show and had a great time interviewing Beverly. Enjoy the show!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Rico No Suave Talk Show
Video.title: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Beverly Pomerantz

Image.alt: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Beverly Pomerantz
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Beverly Pomerantz
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Beverly Pomerantz

Video.summary: Special Guest R&B Singer Andrew Young! Get involved You need to get involved and have a great time with us on the show as the Platinum Downloaded singer has reach a new level with his music
Video.grandparentTitle: The Rico No Suave Talk Show
Video.title: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Andrew Young

Image.alt: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Andrew Young
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Andrew Young
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Andrew Young

Video.summary: Recovery After Surgery with Matt Pack, Fitness Instructor, Pilates Reformer with Ginelle Ruffa
Video.title: Smart Life S1E22

Video.summary: Importance of Wellness Visits with Dr. Deepa Sharma, ing and Self-Defense with Jerome Turner, Meditation with Leslie Glickman, Yoga Instructor
Video.title: Smart Life S1E23

Video.summary: Heart Attacks and Diabetes with Dr. Jonathan Fialkow, Compression Fracture and Kyphoplasty with Dr. Jose Mena, Sleep Apnea with Dr. Richard Vivero
Video.title: Smart Life S1E25

Video.summary: To truly grasp the concept of forgiveness, we have to be willing to see past the person's mistakes. The benefit we get from being more forgiving isn't that other people are going to be more forgiving towards us, it's that it won't affect us when they aren't.
Video.title: Relationships: The Innocence in Everyone

Video.summary: In this lesson, we'll discover the significance of holy relationships. After all, souls are brought together for the purpose of enlightenment.
Video.title: Relationships: Special and Holy Relationships

Video.summary: A single thought plants the seed of a narrative. You feel lonely and unsupported, so, of course, someone must have abandoned you. Over time, the thought “I feel abandoned” grows into the story of an entire childhood. Let’s uproot the thought and untangle the story.
Video.title: My Mom Didn't Fight for Me

Image.alt: My Mom Didn't Fight for Me
My Mom Didn't Fight for Me
My Mom Didn't Fight for Me

Video.summary: Fear is a fickle partner. While it certainly serves a purpose — keeping us out of danger and forcing us to question our assumptions — if we give too much of ourselves over to fear, it will lead us down paths filled with insecurity, broken social interactions, and a persistent struggle against the way things actually are.
Video.title: My Husband Doesn't Want Me as a Business Partner

Image.alt: My Husband Doesn't Want Me as a Business Partner
My Husband Doesn't Want Me as a Business Partner
My Husband Doesn't Want Me as a Business Partner

Video.summary: Definitive statements are comforting. They give life structure and clear direction. But what happens when your declarations are at odds with your subconscious desires?
Video.title: I Don't Trust I'll Find Someone to Create a Life With

Image.alt: I Don't Trust I'll Find Someone to Create a Life With
I Don't Trust I'll Find Someone to Create a Life With
I Don't Trust I'll Find Someone to Create a Life With

Video.summary: Legendary Hip Hop artist Kurtis Blow talks about his humble beginnings. He speaks about his career in Hip Hop and how he is continuing to help others as he follows his passion.
Video.title: LSWMH - Kurtis Blow

Video.summary: Charis Michelsen talks about her experience in modeling and acting. Charis also shares some exciting news about her newest projects.
Video.title: LSWMH - Charis Michelsen

Video.summary: The Pack Drumline leader, Perry Donta'e talks about his group's audition on America's Got Talent. Perry also talks about his philosophy which drives his passion to help at-risk youth.
Video.title: LSWMH - Perry Donta'e

Video.summary: Armand Mastroianni talks about his experiences as a young student of film and his journey as a Hollywood director. His body of work speaks volumes to his standing in the entertainment industry.
Video.title: LSWMH - Armand Mastroianni

Video.summary: Have you ever felt like your hormones are playing a tune out of sync with your well-being? Chances are, they probably are. The good news? There's a transformative journey waiting for women when they realign with nature, pay attention to their meals, and practice intermittent fasting the right way.
Video.title: Dr. Mindy Pelz: How to Become Hormonally Literate through Ancient Healing Practices

Image.alt: Dr. Mindy Pelz: How to Become Hormonally Literate through Ancient Healing Practices
Dr. Mindy Pelz: How to Become Hormonally Literate through Ancient Healing Practices
Dr. Mindy Pelz: How to Become Hormonally Literate through Ancient Healing Practices

Video.summary: Did you know that your metabolic health and energy are controlled by our modern food? This means your metabolism is not broken! You just need to work on healing your metabolism through simple lifestyle shifts you can easily apply to your life today.How? This is what we dive into in this episode of Rooted in Wellness with Casey Means.
Video.title: Dr. Casey Means: Finding Optimal Metabolic Health through Ancient Wisdom

Image.alt: Dr. Casey Means: Finding Optimal Metabolic Health through Ancient Wisdom
Dr. Casey Means: Finding Optimal Metabolic Health through Ancient Wisdom
Dr. Casey Means: Finding Optimal Metabolic Health through Ancient Wisdom

Video.summary: Jack Canfield, with cameo appearance by David Meltzer, interviewer.
Video.title: World's Greatest Motivators - Jack Canfield

Video.summary: Sparsh Shah, with cameo appearance by David Meltzer, interviewer.
Video.title: World's Greatest Motivators - SPARSH SHAH
